1) Why people (x) 應該係"why does people "
2) people (x) 承上 佢口中既"people"係指緊某一個"ethnic group"所以係應該用"peoples" 而加埋前面應該係why do people... 雖然口語真係唔會理
3) complaining and feeling jealous (x) 呢個唔係話有咩錯係好怪 因為你xxx and xxx入面 前面用verb但後面用"feeling jealous" 比人感覺好隔硬離同字彙唔多 可以嘗試用"criticising"或者"envying" 成句而通順好多
4) of others (x) 完全多餘 一個人會唔會jealous自己? 除非佢係特登想講其實佢口中既"people"係指自己 但如果係既佢下面果句就唔應該出現

If were you I would live my life happily enjoying and read more books to make myself to be a better person.

1) If were you (x) 正確: If I were you
2) I would live my life happily enjoying and read more books to make myself to be a better person. (x) 我都唔識講...或者佢可以試下咁講 "I would rather spend more time on the(reading) books to make myself a better person."
